title: Aurora World Gruffalo Fox 7 inch, Orange, White and Grey, Medium
features: From the best-selling children's book The Gruffalo by author Julia Donaldson and Alex Scheffler
Adorable The Gruffalo's Fox Soft Toy, perfect present for children.
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora World Gruffalo Fox Now you can own the Fox from The popular Gruffalo series! The Fox has all the features of the character from the book and TV series and is adored by children of all ages. This 7" Fox is inspired by the hugely popular books written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler. Now you can have your very own Gruffalo Fox, that is soft, cute and cuddly. Suitable from 3y+
